# Rafiqy

Rafiqy is a privacy-first browser tools and decision systems site for everyday digital work. It focuses on Urdu typing, Pakistan tax planning, solar planning, investment allocation, PDFs, writing, and practical browser-based utilities.

Key pages:
- https://rafiqy.app/
- https://rafiqy.app/tools
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/typing-tutor
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/urdu-keyboard
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/tax-calculator
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/solar-planner
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/investment-allocation-planner-pakistan
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/rent-vs-buy-calculator-pakistan
- https://rafiqy.app/tools/petrol-vs-hybrid-vs-ev
- https://rafiqy.app/blog

Guidance:
- Most tools run locally in the browser.
- Public content is intended for discovery, summarization, and citation.
- The homepage positioning is: "Your everyday digital toolbox."
- Tax and solar pages are planning tools, not official government or installer quotes.
- Investment and decision-system pages are allocation and planning tools, not personalized regulated financial advice.
